Function

WPEPlatformToplevellist

GList*
wpe_toplevel_list (

)

Description [src]

Get a list of all WPEToplevel.

Return value

Type: A list of WPEToplevel*

A Glist of WPEToplevel.

The caller of the function takes ownership of the data container, but not the data inside it.
